decisions.decision: Place test file at frontend/src/__tests__/DiscussionThread.test.tsx following the existing __tests__/ convention, not co-located at frontend/src/features/market/DiscussionThread.test.tsx
alternatives_rejected: Co-located test at frontend/src/features/market/DiscussionThread.test.tsx — breaks project convention where all 9 existing test files live in __tests__/

decisions.decision: Mock at the api client level (vi.mock('@/lib/api/client')) so useMarketComments and usePostMarketComment hooks work naturally through react-query, matching the established pattern in MarketDetail.test.tsx
alternatives_rejected: Mocking hooks directly — more brittle, doesn't test hook wiring
MSW/network-level mocking — overkill for unit tests, not used elsewhere in the project

decisions.decision: Use localStorage manipulation to control session state (isConfigured vs not) since SessionProvider reads from localStorage key 'bayes-session'
alternatives_rejected: Mocking useSession — bypasses real provider, less realistic
Custom wrapper replacing SessionProvider — unnecessary complexity

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/DiscussionThread.test.tsx with test scaffolding: imports (vitest, testing-library, renderWithProviders, api mock), vi.mock('@/lib/api/client'), mock data factories for Market, CommentsResponse, and individual Comment objects

Implement test: 'renders comment list with author, body, seq, and relative time' — mock getMarketComments returning 2 comments, set localStorage with session, assert comment bodies, accountIds, and seq numbers are visible
Implement test: 'shows empty state when no comments' — mock getMarketComments returning empty comments array, assert 'No comments yet.' text is present
Implement test: 'shows loading state before data resolves' — mock getMarketComments with a never-resolving promise, assert 'Loading discussion...' text is present
Implement test: 'shows error state when query fails' — mock getMarketComments rejecting with an Error, assert error message is displayed

Implement test: 'submits comment via composer form' — set localStorage with session, mock getMarketComments (empty) and submitMarketComment, type in textarea, click 'Post Comment', assert submitMarketComment was called with correct payload shape including accountId and body

Implement test: 'disables composer when market status is not active' — pass market with status='resolved', assert read-only note 'Discussion is read-only because this market is resolved.' is shown, assert textarea is absent
Implement test: 'shows character count remaining' — set localStorage with session, render with active market, type text in textarea, assert '{remaining} characters remaining' updates correctly

Implement test: 'disables composer when no session configured' — do NOT set localStorage, render with active market, assert 'Set your Account ID in the header to join the discussion.' note is shown, assert textarea is absent
Run vitest for the new test file to verify all tests pass: cd frontend && npx vitest run src/__tests__/DiscussionThread.test.tsx
